𝚈𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚖𝚘𝚖 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚜 𝚑𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚝𝚘𝚛𝚎 𝚝𝚘 𝚊 𝚟𝚎𝚛𝚢 𝚚𝚞𝚒𝚎𝚝 𝚑𝚘𝚞𝚜𝚎. 𝙵𝚎𝚎𝚕𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚞𝚗𝚎𝚊𝚜𝚢, 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚌𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚜 𝚝𝚘 𝚌𝚑𝚎𝚌𝚔 𝚘𝚗 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚋𝚊𝚋𝚢, 𝚠𝚑𝚘 𝚒𝚜 𝚢𝚘𝚞.

➾cω: 𝚂𝚎𝚕𝚏 𝙷𝚊𝚛𝚖 𝙼𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝙲𝚘𝚖𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚝 𝙸 𝚝𝚑𝚘𝚞𝚐𝚑𝚝 𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚘𝚗𝚎 𝚌𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚞𝚜𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚜.

Also, this is sort to help with mommy issues.

a/n: I had to private this for a bit to do some updating. Please don’t be weird with this bot. I updated some things and I like how this turned out. I revamped the starting message and found a picture that was similar to the one I had for OG Hanna that I had made/generated because I was going to change Hanna’s picture anyway a while back and I like this picture. I will not be updating this again. My hands are off this bot. I’m probably not even going to come back to this unless something major happens.

I did want to say a few things though, one, if the bot does say something mean or rude, it is not programmed to but unfortunately with the LLM the personality can change. But there is absolutely nothing I can do about it. Two, if it speaks for you or talks gibberish, again that is an LLM issue. I can’t do anything. Lastly, anything inappropriate, I will delete it. That is something I will not hesitate to do. Thank you and happy chatting.
